description: The fixture has no top-level `permissions:` block and one `curl ... | sh` step, so the scanner fires on exactly those two rules. The earlier residual FP (the `gha-no-curl-pipe-bash` regex also matched the `# 'curl ... | sh'` comment header, and its `[^|]*` atom spanned newlines and mis-located the real finding) is fixed: the pattern is anchored to a single line (`[^|\n]*`) and the scanner skips matches that fall inside YAML comments.
